project.name: sdk-examples
project.summary: Maintenance repository preserving legacy Sylphx SDK example snippets and deployment workflow examples while canonical platform direction lives in SylphxAI/platform.
goals: Preserve simple SDK usage examples for auth, jobs, storage, and container deployment reference.
Keep legacy deployment workflow examples understandable while the canonical implementation lives elsewhere.
Make the repository's legacy and stub status explicit to agents and central audits.
nonGoals: Own the canonical Sylphx SDK, platform API, deploy engine, or product documentation.
Own enterprise doctrine, project manifest schema, org rulesets, rollout issue reconciliation, or shared CI and release policy.
Add new production platform behavior through examples or workflow snippets.

owns.name: legacy-sdk-examples
owns.description: Example TypeScript snippets for authentication, jobs, storage, and basic SDK usage.

owns.name: legacy-deploy-examples
owns.description: Example Dockerfile and legacy Coolify deployment workflow snippets retained for reference.

doesNotOwn: Canonical Sylphx platform APIs, SDK package behavior, deployment engine semantics, product docs, or production platform policy.
Coolify service behavior, registry behavior, or production runtime state beyond example workflow usage.
Enterprise doctrine, project manifest schema, rollout issue reconciliation, org rulesets, or shared workflow implementation.

allowedDependencies.surface: project manifest schema, standards, and rollout audit

forbiddenCouplings: Do not make this repository the canonical source for Sylphx platform or SDK behavior.
Do not add production platform features by changing example snippets or legacy deployment workflows.
Do not couple consumers to legacy Coolify workflow internals as if they were central delivery policy.
Do not publish enterprise process policy from this repository instead of SylphxAI/doctrine.

delivery.deployPath: Legacy workflows can deploy staging from dev and production by manual workflow_dispatch through Coolify; canonical platform delivery policy lives outside this repository.
delivery.productionProof: If these legacy workflows are used, proof must include image/tag readback, Coolify deployment readback, and service smoke evidence; this repository does not yet formalize that proof.

gaps.description: Link the current canonical SDK and deployment examples in SylphxAI/platform before this legacy stub is fully adopted or deprecated.
Decide whether the Coolify workflows should be removed, disabled, or documented as supported legacy operations.
Declare whether example lint/typecheck validation is required or intentionally not applicable for this maintenance repository.
